name: Box
description: Search, read, and access files stored in Box cloud storage through AI chat.
user_auth_instructions: Click 'Connect' to link your Box account and authorize access.
setup_notes:
Uses Box's official MCP server.

Box offers two MCP server options:

1. Remote (Hosted by Box) — Recommended:
   Enable in the Box Admin Console.
   No local installation required.
   See https://support.box.com/hc/en-us/articles/43847256139923

2. Self-hosted (Open Source):
   Clone from https://github.com/box-community/mcp-server-box
   Requires local setup with JWT or Developer Token.

The remote server supports Anthropic Claude, Microsoft Copilot Studio,
and other MCP-compatible clients.
